title: hylodesmum laxum subsp. laxum
intro: Hylodesmum laxum subsp. laxum, also known as Chinese milkvetch or var. laxum, is a legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant activities. The plant's health benefits include relieving coughs, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. The herbal preparations of Hylodesmum laxum subsp. laxum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
